rationale: Educ. Code §44.006 governs school district budget adoption and amendment procedures. It does not address homestead exemptions or property tax revenue levels, so no conflict arises from increasing the exemption amount.
quote: Public funds of the school district may not be spent in any manner other than as provided for in the budget adopted by the board of trustees, but the board may amend a budget or adopt a supplementary emergency budget to cover necessary unforeseen expenses.
_note: Rule concerns budget procedure only; no operative connection to homestead exemption amounts.
